ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being described */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "manner" REAL /* Value of 'manner' for the country */,
  "independence" REAL /* Value of 'independence' for the country */,
  "work" REAL /* Value of 'work' for the country */,
  "responsibility" REAL /* Value of 'responsibility' for the country */,
  "imagination" REAL /* Value of 'imagination' for the country */,
  "respect" REAL /* Value of 'respect' for the country */,
  "money" REAL /* Value of 'money' for the country */,
  "determination" REAL /* Value of 'determination' for the country */,
  "religion" REAL /* Value of 'religion' for the country */,
  "unselfishness" REAL /* Value of 'unselfishness' for the country */,
  "obedience" REAL /* Value of 'obedience' for the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the continent */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Combined GDP of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user uploading the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the uploaded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
